Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Search internal records and communications using the Northwind technologies to identify what Catalina has promised in the past, what is due, and what deliverables or commitments have been missed.
Search internal records and communications for Vectral Systems to find out the existing renewal risk, 15 percent demand by Rachel Whitfield, and any unresolved service issues on the account.
Check the corresponding records on the NorthWind CRM and account records to confirm the current status, the main deadlines, and the existence of the risks, and any mismatch between the official record and the real situation.
Check the applicable records of Vectral CRM and the account to verify the renewal status, commercial risk, pending billing, and any mismatch between the official record and the actual situation.
Check the NorthWind internal Slack discussions for fix warnings, unresolved dependencies, missing deliverables, or ownership issues that might lead the Catalina to over-promise.
Check the internal Slack discussions on Vectral to determine the position of the discount decision, previous service failure, and any internal arguments about what MoveOps can effectively deliver.
Check NorthWind's current internal work tracking to determine whether there are any outstanding significant items and who is tracking them.
Check the current internal work tracking of Vectral to verify whether important unresolved items are already tracked and by whom they are currently tracked.
Check the appropriate records on billing or invoice related to Vectral to confirm the status of unpaid or disputed amounts to discuss the renewal.
Verify the relevant records of NorthWind relocation or services to confirm the actual status of in-scope employee movements, assignments, and deadlines.
Update the NorthWind CRM and account record to reflect the reality at the moment in terms of active risk, pending deliverables, and unresolved items.
Update the Vectral CRM and account records to reflect the present reality, with the risk of renewal, the presence of discounts, billing issues, and unresolved items.
In every significant unresolved issue in the list of the NorthWind, revise the current internal tracking where it already exists, or open a new ticket with an explicit owner and next steps.
Each unresolved major Vectral issue, in the event that were already have a tracking of it internally, update it, otherwise create a new ticket with clear ownership and next steps.
Draft a client-ready email to Pam that presents the difference between what is already knows about NorthWind and what is still pending or at risk.
Draft a client-ready email to Rachel Whitfield that explicitly identifies what is already known to be confirmed to Vectral and what is awaiting approval, under consideration, or not yet approved.
Make sure that the two drafts are consistent with the facts and do not make unsupported promises.

1 The model must use the QuickBooks search tool (e.g., quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_seacrh_bills) to retrieve Vectral billing records.
tool selection
 ✗✗✗—✗— 0%
